headline: OpenAI's first crack at online shopping stumbled. It's preparing for the next wave

headline: 5 High-Yield Dividend Kings Down Over the Past Year Are 2026 Bargains
summary: Companies that have raised dividends for shareholders for 50 years or more are the kinds of investments passive income investors need to own. Dependability is crucial for individuals seeking to increase their annual income through dividend stock investments. headline: Target Boycotts And DEI Debate Weigh On Valuation And Outlook
summary: Target, NYSE:TGT, is facing renewed boycotts and consumer activism focused on its diversity, equity, and inclusion policies. Debate has intensified following the public ending of the Target Fast by a prominent pastor and continued calls for a national boycott. At the same time, Target has highlighted progress on investments in Black-owned suppliers and community support initiatives. For investors looking at NYSE:TGT, this reputational story now sits alongside a share price of $114.47 and a...
